name: Pan Roasted Turnips with Poppy & Paprika (Mm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the turnips with salt and pepper.
2. In a large oven-proof sauté pan, heat the butter until it begins to brown.
3. Add the turnips and toss to coat them well.
4. Add the poppy seeds and cook until they are light golden brown, about 8 to 9 minutes.
5. Add the paprika and toss to coat evenly.
6. Add the vinegar and cook until it has evaporated, 4 to 5 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and serve.
